name: Her Desire
overview: This is a story about two people who desire to have the best love in life. One person uses their mind and heart, while the other relies on their beauty and body. However, both find each other and love blooms despite their obvious differences.

trailers.title: [TRAILER] เพลิงนาง | เริ่ม 15 สิงหาคมนี้ | AMARIN TVHD34
